conclusion: Current no-flag c4 profiler evidence is generated-token green at [137,137,137,137] with row-aware batched LM-head and accepted c-aware projection. The trace contains native batch full-attention context/KV append, grouped-MoE, accepted c-aware projection, row-aware output GEMV, linear segment decode, batch residual combine, batch_argmax_stage{1,2}, and FP16-to-BF16 final-cast kernels. C4 remains non-retained because full attention is rowchunk diagnostic/native_caware_decode=false; no throughput/scaling claim is made.
